leagueBriefing: The Islanders made history with their 10th straight overtime win, while the Rangers and Wild dominated with shutouts on a busy Tuesday night. In a potential playoff preview, the Oilers edged the Avalanche in a high-scoring thriller, and the Blue Jackets continued their surprising surge by extending their point streak to seven games.

games.headline: Bruins edge Kings in overtime after tight defensive battle
games.brief: In a game where goals were hard to come by, the Bruins found the extra gear in the bonus frame to take down the Kings. After a scoreless first 40 minutes, both teams traded goals in the third, but Boston's transition game in overtime proved to be the difference maker in front of the home crowd.
bullets: Mason Lohrei opened the scoring for Boston midway through the third period with his seventh goal of the season.
Kings defenseman Drew Doughty forced overtime with a one-timer at the six-minute mark of the third period.
Boston outshot Los Angeles 12-8 through the first two periods, but the Kings led the overall shot count early on.
The win marks another strong home performance for the Bruins, who improved to 25-8-1 at TD Garden.
games.context: Boston continues to solidify its position as one of the top home teams in the league.

highlights.title: Kings vs. Bruins | NHL Highlights | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Garland stays hot as Blue Jackets extend point streak to seven
games.brief: Conor Garland is playing out of his mind right now, netting his second consecutive two-goal game to lead the Blue Jackets past the Lightning. Columbus completely neutralized Tampa Bay's high-powered offense, limiting them to just 18 shots and handing the Lightning their sixth loss in seven games.
bullets: Conor Garland scored twice, including a critical power-play goal in the third period.
Zach Werenski and Sean Monahan each recorded two assists for the Blue Jackets.
The Blue Jackets have now earned points in seven consecutive games.
Tampa Bay was held to just 18 shots on goal in the loss.
games.context: The Blue Jackets are emerging as a serious spoiler in the Eastern Conference playoff race.

highlights.title: Blue Jackets vs. Lightning | NHL Highlights | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Lafrenière hat trick and Quick shutout fuel Rangers' revenge
games.brief: Alexis Lafrenière stole the show at Madison Square Garden, recording a hat trick to power the Rangers to a dominant victory over Calgary. Behind him, veteran Jonathan Quick was a wall, earning a historic shutout to avenge a lopsided loss to the Flames earlier this season.
bullets: Alexis Lafrenière scored three goals, leading the Rangers' newly formed top line.
Jonathan Quick stopped all shots faced for a historic shutout at age 40.
The win avenges a 5-1 loss the Rangers suffered in Calgary back in October.
Mika Zibanejad and Perreault anchored the top line alongside Lafrenière in the absence of J.T. Miller.
games.context: Lafrenière's breakout performance highlights the Rangers' depth as they look to climb the Metropolitan standings.

highlights.title: Flames vs. Rangers | NHL Highlights | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Islanders set NHL record with 10th straight overtime victory
games.brief: The Islanders have become the masters of the extra frame, making NHL history by winning their 10th consecutive game decided in overtime. After falling behind 3-0, New York staged a gritty comeback capped by Mathew Barzal's stunning individual effort to secure the two points in St. Louis.
bullets: The Islanders are the first team in NHL history to go 10-0 in overtime in a single season.
Mathew Barzal finished with a goal and two assists, including the game-winner.
New York erased a 3-0 deficit, scoring four unanswered goals to win.
The Islanders fired a season-high 49 shots on the Blues' net.
games.context: The win pulls the Islanders even with Pittsburgh for second place in the Metropolitan Division.

highlights.title: Islanders vs. Blues | NHL Highlights | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Stars defensive masterclass stifles Golden Knights
games.brief: Dallas won a low-scoring, defensive grind against Vegas, relying on timely special teams play and a rock-solid performance in front of Jake Oettinger. Despite a strong defensive showing from the Knights, their offense couldn't generate enough high-quality looks to overcome a quick second-period surge from the Stars.
bullets: Jack Eichel scored his 23rd goal of the season to give Vegas an early lead.
Jamie Benn was instrumental in the Stars' second-period comeback.
The game saw only five shots on goal total in the entire first period.
Vegas failed to convert on a crucial power play early in the third period.
games.context: The Stars' victory keeps them near the top of the Western Conference standings.

highlights.title: Golden Knights vs. Stars | NHL Highlights | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Ducks' second-period explosion halts Jets' point streak
games.brief: Anaheim used a lightning-fast scoring outburst in the second period to stun the Jets in Winnipeg. After falling behind 1-0, the Ducks scored three times in less than two minutes, proving that their top-tier Pacific Division standing is no fluke and cooling off one of the league's hottest teams.
bullets: Ryan Poehling led the way with a goal and an assist for the Ducks.
Anaheim scored three goals in a span of just 1 minute and 44 seconds in the second period.
Lukas Dostal continued his hot streak, winning his 13th game in his last 15 starts.
The loss ended Winnipeg's six-game point streak.
games.context: The win keeps Anaheim in sole possession of first place in the Pacific Division.

highlights.title: Ducks vs. Jets | NHL Highlights | March 10, 2026

games.headline: Ufko's milestone goal helps Predators sink Kraken
games.brief: Nashville handled business in Seattle, led by a memorable moment for rookie Ryan Ufko. The Predators' balanced attack and steady goaltending were too much for the Kraken, who struggled to find consistent offense despite a loud home crowd at Climate Pledge Arena.
bullets: Ryan Ufko scored his first career NHL goal in the victory.
The Predators used a three-goal second period to take control of the game.
Seattle's losing streak continues as they struggle to stay in the wild card hunt.
Nashville improved their road record as they push for a higher playoff seed.
games.context: The win provides crucial points for Nashville as the Western Conference playoff race tightens.

highlights.title: Predators vs. Kraken | NHL Highlights | March 10, 2026
